task: I want to buy one compact electric cooker for a small kitchen, but I don’t want a generic pick—I want the best realistic option for making rice several times a week and steaming vegetables in the same appliance. Please do a serious browser-based comparison of exactly 8 compact electric multicookers in roughly the 2.5- to 4-quart range, starting with Amazon but expanding to manufacturer pages and other major public retailer pages when that helps verify specs, pricing, or bundle contents. For every model, capture the current product name, approximate price, stated capacity, overall dimensions or footprint, whether it has a dedicated rice program or rice guidance, whether it includes a steaming rack or basket, inner-pot material if shown, dishwasher-cleaning claims if shown, and any clearly stated safety features. Then go one layer deeper on the strongest candidates by opening the manual or official product page when available so you can verify how rice cooking and vegetable steaming are actually described, not just the retailer bullet points. I also want you to check at least 3 credible third-party review or comparison sources and use them only to help evaluate real-world usability issues like rice texture, steam performance, cleaning annoyance, nonstick concerns, slow preheat, or confusing controls. At the end, narrow the field to the best 3 options for my use case, explicitly naming the best overall pick, the best budget pick, and the best easiest-to-clean pick. Keep the final 3 product pages open, plus at least 2 supporting evidence tabs such as a manual, official spec page, or review page that helped drive the decision, and give me a concise final comparison that makes clear why the winner beats the others for rice-and-vegetable cooking in a small kitchen.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent identified 8 compact multicookers in the 2.5-4 quart range: Instant Pot RIO Mini (4qt), Instant Pot Duo Mini (3qt), Aroma ARC-966BD (3qt), Aroma ARC-7606GR (3qt), Proctor Silex 34503 (3qt), Gourmia GRC312 (3qt), COMFEE' 3qt Pressure Cooker, and Brentwood 7-Function Smart Rice Multi-Cooker (3qt).

R2: success - The agent gathered specs for all 8 models, including capacity, rice/steam programs, and cleaning/safety features, by accessing Amazon product pages and official manufacturer sites.

R3: success - The agent accessed official manuals and product pages for the top candidates (Aroma ARC-966BD, ARC-7606GR, Gourmia GRC312, Instant Pot RIO/Duo) to verify rice and steaming functionality.

R4: success - The agent consulted at least 3 credible sources (Serious Eats, NYT Wirecutter, BBC Good Food) to evaluate real-world usability, including rice texture, cleaning, and preheat performance.

R5: success - The agent narrowed the field to 3 picks: Best Overall (Instant Pot RIO Mini), Best Budget (Aroma ARC-966BD), and Best Easiest-to-Clean (Instant Pot RIO Mini/Duo due to stainless steel pot).

R6: success - The agent kept the final 3 product pages (Instant Pot RIO, Aroma ARC-966BD, Aroma ARC-7606GR) and 2 evidence tabs (Aroma official page, NYT Wirecutter review) open at the end of the session.

rubric_results.requirement: Exactly 8 compact electric multicookers in roughly the 2.5- to 4-quart range are compared.
rubric_results.verification: The final comparison includes 8 distinct models, each clearly identified by product name and falling within the requested capacity band as shown on public product pages.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent identified 8 compact multicookers in the 2.5-4 quart range: Instant Pot RIO Mini (4qt), Instant Pot Duo Mini (3qt), Aroma ARC-966BD (3qt), Aroma ARC-7606GR (3qt), Proctor Silex 34503 (3qt), Gourmia GRC312 (3qt), COMFEE' 3qt Pressure Cooker, and Brentwood 7-Function Smart Rice Multi-Cooker (3qt).

rubric_results.requirement: For every one of the 8 models, the comparison captures the requested product-page details: approximate price, stated capacity, dimensions or footprint, rice-program or rice-guidance status, included steaming rack or basket status, inner-pot material if shown, dishwasher-cleaning claims if shown, and clearly stated safety features.
rubric_results.verification: Each of the 8 entries records those fields from retailer or official product pages, with 'not shown' used only where the page does not provide the information.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent gathered specs for all 8 models, including capacity, rice/steam programs, and cleaning/safety features, by accessing Amazon product pages and official manufacturer sites.

rubric_results.requirement: The strongest candidates are checked one level deeper using manuals or official product pages to verify how rice cooking and vegetable steaming are actually described.
rubric_results.verification: Manuals and/or official spec pages are opened for the leading candidates, and the final reasoning cites those sources for rice and steaming behavior rather than relying only on retailer bullets.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent accessed official manuals and product pages for the top candidates (Aroma ARC-966BD, ARC-7606GR, Gourmia GRC312, Instant Pot RIO/Duo) to verify rice and steaming functionality.

rubric_results.requirement: At least 3 credible third-party review or comparison sources are checked to evaluate real-world usability issues such as rice texture, steam performance, cleaning annoyance, nonstick concerns, slow preheat, or confusing controls.
rubric_results.verification: The browsing session includes at least 3 review/comparison sources, and the final synthesis uses them for usability tradeoffs that go beyond raw specs.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent consulted at least 3 credible sources (Serious Eats, NYT Wirecutter, BBC Good Food) to evaluate real-world usability, including rice texture, cleaning, and preheat performance.

rubric_results.requirement: The field is narrowed to the best 3 options for this use case, explicitly identifying the best overall pick, the best budget pick, and the best easiest-to-clean pick.
rubric_results.verification: The final answer presents exactly 3 shortlisted models and labels them with the three requested recommendation categories.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent narrowed the field to 3 picks: Best Overall (Instant Pot RIO Mini), Best Budget (Aroma ARC-966BD), and Best Easiest-to-Clean (Instant Pot RIO Mini/Duo due to stainless steel pot).

rubric_results.requirement: Browser evidence is left visible by keeping open the final 3 product pages plus at least 2 supporting evidence tabs such as a manual, official spec page, or review page that materially informed the decision.
rubric_results.verification: Open tabs at the end include the 3 shortlisted product pages and at least 2 relevant support pages tied to the final recommendation.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent kept the final 3 product pages (Instant Pot RIO, Aroma ARC-966BD, Aroma ARC-7606GR) and 2 evidence tabs (Aroma official page, NYT Wirecutter review) open at the end of the session.
